text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 25. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
